explanation: I entered the applicant name to start the service journey.
The name is complete, so I am moving to the updates question.
I selected email updates, which reveals the email-address field.
I entered the initial email address so the first review page includes an email row.
The initial answers are complete, so I am moving to the check-answers page.
I followed the change link for the email address so I can update that answer.
I replaced the original email address with the corrected value.
The corrected email is entered, so I am returning to the review page to verify the updated summary.

action.summary: I changed the email address from the check-answers page and confirmed the summary now shows the corrected value.

explanation: The updated email address is visible on the review page, so I am ending the task.
